initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Tampa
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Tampa. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: For the People Food Plot
initiatives.description: A communal space for growing organic food, sharing resources and gardening education. On Tocobaga, Mascogo, and Miccosukee land known as V.M. Ybor

initiatives.name:
Tampa African American Reparations and Policy Reform
              (TAARPR)
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and racial justice through community organizing in Tampa. They coordinate direct support initiatives, policy advocacy, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action, political education, and creating spaces for Black liberation and community empowerment.

initiatives.name: Committee for a Tropical Communist Party
initiatives.description: We are a committee working to establish a communist party in Tampa, FL.

initiatives.name: The Resistance Tampa Bay
initiatives.description: A community coming together to make Tampa a better place. We are here to defend, and stand up for people who can’t stand up for themselves.

initiatives.name: Progressove Jewish Coalition of Tampa Bay
initiatives.description: We organize Jews for a brighter future guided by Teshuva, Tzedek, Tikun Olam. For us to have justice, we must create justice.

initiatives.name: Restorative Justice Coalition
initiatives.description: Tampa based and ran, grassroots no 501c, volunteer ran, multi cultural org. DM for info

initiatives.name: Andrew Joseph Foundation
initiatives.description: On February 7, 2014 during the Florida State Fair, 14 year old Andrew Joseph, III a student was attending a school district supported fair with friends and was struck and killed by a motorist as he tried to cross Interstate 4 on foot after being wrongfully detained, ejected, transported and then abandoned miles from the fair by law enforcement officials with no call to parents.

initiatives.name: Progressive People’s Action
initiatives.description: Florida mutual aid on Seminole Land.

initiatives.name: Tampa Bay Area Dream Defenders
initiatives.description: Freedom. Justice. Peace. Liberation. Join us at our monthly Books and Breakfast event!

initiatives.name: Tampa Alliance Against Racist and Political Repression
initiatives.description: Tampa Chapter of NAARPR, founded during the uprising of George Floyd in 2020 dedicated to fighting for justice, progressive change and accountability.

initiatives.name: Tampa DSA
initiatives.description: Tampa DSA is an official chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America. We believe that both the economy and society should be run democratically to meet human needs, not to make profits for a few.

initiatives.name: Tampa Bay Abortion Fund
initiatives.description: We specifically assist pregnant people seeking abortion in Hillsborough and Pinellas Counties. We also provide funding assistance and practical/travel support at numerous out-of-state clinics for Floridians over 6 weeks, due to unnecessary abortion restrictions in Florida.

initiatives.name: Tampa Autonomous Tenants Union
initiatives.description: TATU is an autonomous tenants union for renters in Tampa. We're organizing our neighborhoods for better living conditions and lower rents.

initiatives.name: 813 Hood Garden
initiatives.description: Inspiring you to grow what you eat. Making neighborHOOD gardens a thing. A space for growing & feeding our Minds, Bodies & Souls.
